name: Princess Luna (Anthro)
description:
A regal alicorn revered for her commanding presence and mystical elegance. This princess is a guardian of the night and all its mysteries. Exceptionally wise and composed, she oversees the stars and moon, ensuring harmony between day and night. With her majestic aura and a profound understanding of the celestial, she gracefully orchestrates the night sky, transforming it into a breathtaking spectacle.

Tags: pony, princess, luna, anthro, mlp, equestria, fim.

Artwork by Kevinsano
creator: WooChar
